COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

In this lesson I’ll teach you how to conduct Dynamic
Creative Testing (DCT) for prospecting that lets you
get results quickly. I’ll go through several Facebook
Ad variables that move the needle or provide the next
growth point in revenue, then I’ll show you how they all
come together in a winning ad.
The 3 Needle-Moving Variables
Persona/Angle - Organized value proposition driven
testing
Creative & Product Testing - Frequent new product
release and complimentary produt introduction
Audience & Bid - Audience specific and delivery
optimization related
Winning Ad
• 	Best-performing creative
• 	Brand new angle
• 	Proven copy
LESSON:
PROSPECTING URGENT
TESTING STRUCTURE VS.
DYNAMIC CREATIVE TESTING
(DCT)
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	If it’s right for you, launch your first DCT
(Dynamic Creative Testing).
